---
title: "eqtl results exploration"
##output: html_notebook
---
```{r}
suppressMessages({
    library(data.table)
    library(qs2)
    library(SummarizedExperiment)
    library(ggplot2)
    library(here)
  })
here::i_am('.git/HEAD')
datadir=here("processed-data", "eQTL")
rdsdir=here("processed-data", "rds")
refdir=here("processed-data", "ref")
```


```{r load GWAS and gene ranges}
## load gene-symbol data
<<<<<<< HEAD
granges <- qs_read(file.path(refdir,"granges.qs2")) ## gene info file created by 00_explore_data.Rmd last chunk
=======
granges <- qs_read("granges.qs2") ## gene info file created by 00_explore_data.Rmd
>>>>>>> 2555201d (add coloc prior-sensitivity testing, Venn diagrams with Habenula)
g2sym <- setNames(granges$gene_name, granges$gene_id)

## load GWAS data (for rsid annotation only)
fgwasflt <- file.path(refdir, 'SCZ_GWAS_flt_1e-6_R.8.tab.gz')
gwas <- fread(fgwasflt)
gwas_set <- unique(gwas[p<5e-8]$variant_id)

## genotype-gwas harmonized variant file
fgtgwas <- file.path(refdir, 'GWAS_SCZ_tqtl-matched.tab.gz')
if (file.exists(fgtgwas)) {
  gwas_vars <- fread(fgtgwas)
} else {
  stop("file not found: ", fgtgwas)
}
```

```{r dataset labels}
ds2name <- setNames(
  c("SpD01-WMtz", "SpD02-L3/4", "SpD03-L6", "SpD04-WM", "SpD05-L5",
    "SpD06-L2/3","SpD07-L1", "Neun", "Vasc", "PNN", "Neuropil"),
  c(paste0('spd0',1:7), "neun", "vasc", "pnn", "neuropil")
)
window_levels <- c("w500k", "w1mb")
window_labels <- c(w500k = "500kb primary", w1mb = "1Mb sensitivity")
```

```{r coloc utility functions}
assign_cat <- function(dt) {
  dt[, cat := fcase(
    PP4 >= 0.8, "strong_coloc",
    PP34 >= 0.8 & PP4_over_PP34 >= 0.9, "likely_coloc",
    PP34 >= 0.8 & PP4_over_PP34 < 0.5, "distinct_causal",
    (PP34 >= 0.8) | (PP4_over_PP34 >= 0.8), "follow_up",
    default = NA_character_
  )]
  dt[]
}

## Flatten one coloc-abf list into a feature-level table using cat only.
flattenFltColoc <- function(l, cs_level=0.95, pp4_min=0.50, pp34_min=0.80,
                            add_priors=TRUE, id_map=NULL, do_filter=TRUE) {
  ids <- names(l)
  out <- rbindlist(lapply(ids, function(feature_id) {
    x <- l[[feature_id]]
    if (is.null(x$summary) || is.null(x$results)) return(NULL)
    s <- as.list(x$summary)
    res <- as.data.table(x$results)
    if (!"SNP.PP.H4" %chin% names(res)) return(NULL)
    setorderv(res, "SNP.PP.H4", -1L)
    res[, cum_h4 := cumsum(SNP.PP.H4)]
    cs_idx <- which(res$cum_h4 >= cs_level)[1L]
    cs_n <- if (is.na(cs_idx)) nrow(res) else cs_idx
    lead <- res[1]
    dt <- data.table(
      nsnps=as.numeric(s[["nsnps"]]),
      PP0=as.numeric(s[["PP.H0.abf"]]),
      PP1=as.numeric(s[["PP.H1.abf"]]),
      PP2=as.numeric(s[["PP.H2.abf"]]),
      PP3=as.numeric(s[["PP.H3.abf"]]),
      PP4=as.numeric(s[["PP.H4.abf"]]),
      PP34=as.numeric(s[["PP.H3.abf"]]) + as.numeric(s[["PP.H4.abf"]]),
      PP4_over_PP34=as.numeric(s[["PP.H4.abf"]]) / (as.numeric(s[["PP.H3.abf"]]) + as.numeric(s[["PP.H4.abf"]])),
      lead_snp=as.character(lead[["snp"]]),
      lead_snp_PPH4=as.numeric(lead[["SNP.PP.H4"]]),
      lead_snp_PPsho=as.numeric(s[["PP.H4.abf"]]) * as.numeric(lead[["SNP.PP.H4"]]),
      cs95_n_snp=as.integer(cs_n)
    )
    if (add_priors && !is.null(x$priors)) {
      pr <- x$priors
      dt[, `:=`(p1=as.numeric(pr["p1"]), p2=as.numeric(pr["p2"]), p12=as.numeric(pr["p12"]))]
    }
    dt[, fid := feature_id]
    setcolorder(dt, c("fid", setdiff(names(dt), "fid")))
    dt
  }), fill=TRUE)
  if (is.null(out) || nrow(out)==0L) return(out)
  if (!is.null(id_map)) {
    key <- out[["fid"]]
    nm <- unname(id_map[key])
    out[, fid := ifelse(!is.na(nm), paste0(nm, "|", key), key)]
  }
  ## keep candidate loci for follow-up reporting
  if (do_filter) out <- out[PP4 >= pp4_min | PP34 >= pp34_min]
  out <- assign_cat(out)
  setcolorder(out, c("fid", "cat", setdiff(names(out), c("fid", "cat"))))
  out[]
}

saveFlattenedColoc <- function(l, out_path, ...) {
  dt <- flattenFltColoc(l, ...)
  if (is.null(dt) || nrow(dt)==0L) {
    warning("No rows to write: ", out_path)
    return(invisible(dt))
  }
  fwrite(dt, out_path, sep="\t", quote=FALSE)
  invisible(dt)
}

flattenColocAndSave <- function(path, ...) {
  out_path <- sub("\\.qs2$", ".flat.tab.gz", path)
  if (file.exists(out_path)) {
    message("Output file exists, skipping: ", out_path)
    return(fread(out_path))
  }
  l <- qs_read(path)
  stopifnot(out_path != path)
  saveFlattenedColoc(l, out_path, ...)
}
```

```{r load+flatten coloc per window}
cdts <- list()
for (w in window_levels) {
  cdts[[w]] <- list()
  for (ds in names(ds2name)) {
    fp <- file.path(datadir, "coloc", w, sprintf("coloc_%s_gene.qs2", ds))
    if (!file.exists(fp)) stop("file not found: ", fp)
    ff <- sub("\\.qs2$", ".flat.tab.gz", fp)
    if (file.exists(ff)) {
      cdts[[w]][[ds]] <- fread(ff)
    } else {
      message("flattening: ", fp)
      cdts[[w]][[ds]] <- flattenColocAndSave(fp)
      if (!file.exists(ff)) stop("flattenColocAndSave failed: ", fp)
    }
  }
  cdts[[w]] <- cdts[[w]][names(ds2name)]
}
```

```{r aggregate data and save tables}
fc_all <- rbindlist(lapply(window_levels, function(w) {
  x <- rbindlist(cdts[[w]], idcol = "ds")
  x[, window := w]
  x
}), fill = TRUE)

fc_all[, gene_name := g2sym[fid]]
fc_all[gwas_vars, rsid := i.rsid, on = .(lead_snp = variant_id)]
setcolorder(fc_all, c(
  "window", "ds", "fid", "gene_name", "cat", "lead_snp", "rsid", "nsnps",
  setdiff(names(fc_all), c("window", "ds", "fid", "gene_name", "cat", "lead_snp", "rsid", "nsnps"))
))

## primary results table used for claims/reporting (500kb)
fc_primary <- fc_all[window == "w500k"]
fcoloc_primary <- file.path(datadir, "coloc", "coloc_abf_results.tsv.gz")
fwrite(fc_primary, file = fcoloc_primary, sep = "\t")

## save by-window table for robustness analysis
fcoloc_by_window <- file.path(datadir, "coloc", "coloc_abf_results_by_window.tsv.gz")
fwrite(fc_all, file = fcoloc_by_window, sep = "\t")
```

## MAPK3 eQTL: chr16:30114519:G:C = rs7542

Note in the coloc results, other SNPs for MAPK3 have low PP4, high PP34 (likely distinct causal variants).

> fc_all[gene_name=="MAPK3", .(ds, gene_name, lead_snp, rsid, cat, PP2, PP3, PP4, PP34, PP4_over_PP34)]
         ds gene_name           lead_snp      rsid             cat        PP2       PP3        PP4      PP34 PP4_over_PP34
     <char>    <char>             <char>    <char>          <char>      <num>     <num>      <num>     <num>         <num>
1:     neun     MAPK3 chr16:29983601:C:T rs3814883 distinct_causal 0.04776160 0.8897589 0.06247953 0.9522384    0.06561333
2:     vasc     MAPK3 chr16:29943634:A:G rs3924855 distinct_causal 0.17690437 0.4246164 0.39847925 0.8230956    0.48412267
3: neuropil     MAPK3 chr16:29983601:C:T rs3814883 distinct_causal 0.01491199 0.9533316 0.03175638 0.9850880    0.03223710


```{r plot prep}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)

pp4_thr <- 0.80
pp34_thr <- 0.80
rat_thr <- 0.90

# fc_all assumed to already have ds, PP4, PP34, PP4_over_PP34
fc_all[, cat := fcase(
  PP4 >= 0.8, "strong_coloc",
  PP34 >= 0.8 & PP4_over_PP34 >= 0.9, "likely_coloc",
  PP34 >= 0.8 & PP4_over_PP34 < 0.5,  "distinct_causal",
  (PP34 >= 0.8) | (PP4_over_PP34 >= 0.8),       "follow_up", ## we already have PP4>0.5
  default = NA_character_
)]


#fc_all[, cat := fcase(
#  PP34 >= 0.8 & PP4_over_PP34 >= 0.9, "strong_coloc",
#  PP34 >= 0.8 & PP4_over_PP34 < 0.5,  "distinct_causal",
#  (PP34 >= 0.8) | (PP4 >= 0.8),       "follow_up", ## we already have PP4>0.5
#  default = NA_character_
#)]
## get a quick summary/list in the console for now
#fc_all[cat=="strong_coloc", .(strong_coloc_genes = paste(sort(unique(gene_name)), collapse=", ")), by=.(ds)]
#fc_all[cat=="follow_up", .(followup_genes = paste(sort(unique(gene_name)), collapse=", ")), by=.(ds)]

all_ds <- data.table(ds = names(ds2name))
all_cat <- data.table(cat = c("strong_coloc", "likely_coloc"))
all_grid <- CJ(ds = all_ds$ds, cat = all_cat$cat, unique = TRUE)

pdt <- fc_all[cat %chin% c("strong_coloc", "likely_coloc"),
  .( N = .N,
    genes =  paste(sort(unique(gene_name)), collapse = ", ")
  ),  by = .(ds, cat)
]
```

```{r primary cat summary}
cat_summary_primary <- fc_primary[!is.na(cat),
  .(N = .N, genes = paste(sort(unique(gene_name)), collapse = ", ")),
  by = .(ds, cat)
][order(ds, cat)]
cat_summary_primary
```

```{r primary stacked bars}
plot_dt <- fc_primary[cat %chin% c("strong_coloc", "likely_coloc"),
  .N, by = .(ds, cat)]

all_grid <- CJ(ds = names(ds2name), cat = c("strong_coloc", "likely_coloc"), unique = TRUE)
plot_dt <- all_grid[plot_dt, on = .(ds, cat)]
plot_dt[is.na(N), N := 0L]

tot <- plot_dt[, .(Ntot = sum(N)), by = ds]

ggplot(
  plot_dt,
  aes(
    x = factor(ds, levels = names(ds2name), labels = unname(ds2name)),
    y = N, fill = cat
  )
) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = ifelse(N > 0, N, "")),
    position = position_stack(vjust = 0.5),
    size = 3
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = tot,
    aes(x = factor(ds, levels = names(ds2name), labels = unname(ds2name)), y = Ntot, label = paste0("n=", Ntot)),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, hjust = -0.1, size = 3
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Number of genes",
    title = "Primary colocalization candidates by dataset (500kb)",
    subtitle = paste0(
      "cat rules: strong_coloc = PP4 >= 0.8; likely_coloc = PP34 >= 0.8 & PP4/(PP34) >= 0.9; ",
      "distinct_causal = PP34 >= 0.8 & PP4/(PP34) < 0.5; follow_up = PP34 >= 0.8 | PP4/(PP34) >= 0.8"
    )
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(strong_coloc = "#7ebae0", likely_coloc = "#c6dbf8"))
```

```{r window comparison counts}
cat_counts_window <- fc_all[!is.na(cat),
  .(N = .N), by = .(window, ds, cat)
][order(window, ds, cat)]
cat_counts_window
```

```{r window comparison strong-likely metrics}
jaccard <- function(a, b) {
  u <- union(a, b)
  if (!length(u)) return(NA_real_)
  length(intersect(a, b)) / length(u)
}

cmp_cats <- c("strong_coloc", "likely_coloc")
cmp <- rbindlist(lapply(names(ds2name), function(ctx) {
  rbindlist(lapply(cmp_cats, function(cc) {
    s500 <- fc_all[window == "w500k" & ds == ctx & cat == cc, fid]
    s1mb <- fc_all[window == "w1mb"  & ds == ctx & cat == cc, fid]
    data.table(
      ds = ctx,
      cat = cc,
      n_500k = length(s500),
      n_1mb = length(s1mb),
      n_shared = length(intersect(s500, s1mb)),
      n_gain_1mb = length(setdiff(s1mb, s500)),
      n_loss_1mb = length(setdiff(s500, s1mb)),
      jaccard = jaccard(s500, s1mb)
    )
  }))
}))
cmp[order(ds, cat)]
```

```{r top discordant loci}
wide <- dcast(
  fc_all[, .(ds, fid, gene_name, window, cat, PP4, PP34, PP4_over_PP34, lead_snp)],
  ds + fid + gene_name ~ window,
  value.var = c("cat", "PP4", "PP34", "PP4_over_PP34", "lead_snp"),
  fill = NA
)
discord <- wide[(cat_w500k != cat_w1mb) | (is.na(cat_w500k) != is.na(cat_w1mb))]
discord[, major_change := fifelse(
  cat_w500k %chin% c("strong_coloc", "likely_coloc") |
    cat_w1mb %chin% c("strong_coloc", "likely_coloc"),
  1L, 0L
)]
setorder(discord, -major_change, ds, gene_name)

cmp_dir <- file.path(datadir, "coloc", "window_comparison")
if (!dir.exists(cmp_dir)) dir.create(cmp_dir, recursive = TRUE)
fdiscord <- file.path(cmp_dir, "top_discordant_loci.tsv.gz")
fwrite(discord, fdiscord, sep = "\t")

discord[1:min(.N, 100L)]
```

```{r window comparison plot}
cmp_plot <- fc_all[cat %chin% c("strong_coloc", "likely_coloc"),
  .N, by = .(window, ds, cat)]
cmp_grid <- CJ(window = window_levels, ds = names(ds2name), cat = c("strong_coloc", "likely_coloc"), unique = TRUE)
cmp_plot <- cmp_grid[cmp_plot, on = .(window, ds, cat)]
cmp_plot[is.na(N), N := 0L]

ggplot(
  cmp_plot,
  aes(
    x = factor(ds, levels = names(ds2name), labels = unname(ds2name)),
    y = N,
    fill = cat
  )
) +
  geom_col(position = "stack", width = 0.75) +
  coord_flip() +
  facet_wrap(~ window, ncol = 1, labeller = as_labeller(window_labels)) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Number of genes",
    title = "Window sensitivity for strong/likely colocalization calls"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(strong_coloc = "#4f83b6", likely_coloc = "#9fc4e4"))
```
